tasks.subject: Task 1: Isolate per-test CWD in test_dispatcher.bats
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Give tests/unit/test_dispatcher.bats a per-test setup()/teardown() so every test runs in a fresh isolated repo — eliminating the newfile.txt/staged.txt worktree leak (elifarley/hug-scm#180) and making the CWD-sensitive `hug init` test deterministic (elifarley/hug-scm#167).

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/unit/test_dispatcher.bats (add setup()/teardown() after `load '../test_helper'`; remove redundant/dead create_test_repo + cd "$TEST_REPO" lines from the enumerated tests).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- setup() (require_hug; TEST_REPO=$(create_test_repo); cd "$TEST_REPO") and teardown() (cleanup_test_repo) added, matching test_status_json.bats.
- No bare create_test_repo or cd "$TEST_REPO" line remains (grep none).
- From the linked worktree: make test-unit TEST_FILE=test_dispatcher.bats passes all tests AND no newfile.txt/staged.txt appears in the worktree root.
- The `hug init` no-args dispatch test passes from the worktree (was failing per #167).
- Full make test-unit green; make sanitize-check clean.

**Verify:** cd ~/IdeaProjects/hug-scm.WT.fix-test-dispatcher-isolation && make test-unit TEST_FILE=test_dispatcher.bats && test ! -e newfile.txt && test ! -e staged.txt && echo CLEAN

**Steps:**
1. Reproduce (red): run dispatcher tests from the worktree, confirm leak (and note #167 init behavior).
2. Clean up reproduced leaked files.
3. Add setup()/teardown() after the load line.
4. Remove create_test_repo + cd "$TEST_REPO" from the enumerated tests (keep the echo > newfile.txt/staged.txt lines).
5. Re-run dispatcher tests from worktree -> pass, no leak.
6. grep confirms none remain; make test-unit; make sanitize-check.
7. Commit (commit-message skill) with Closes elifarley/hug-scm#180 + Closes elifarley/hug-scm#167.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/unit/test_dispatcher.bats"], "verifyCommand": "cd ~/IdeaProjects/hug-scm.WT.fix-test-dispatcher-isolation && make test-unit TEST_FILE=test_dispatcher.bats && test ! -e newfile.txt && test ! -e staged.txt && echo CLEAN", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setup()/teardown() added matching test_status_json.bats", "no bare create_test_repo or cd TEST_REPO remains (grep none)", "from worktree: dispatcher tests pass and no newfile.txt/staged.txt leak", "hug init no-args test passes from worktree (#167)", "full make test-unit green; make sanitize-check clean"]}
```
